languages.text:
The coolant is rapidly losing its integrity. At the start of each round, the stack count of this effect decreases by 1. When the last stack is removed, the ice shatters, releasing the imprisoned Necrons at full combat capacity.
Connected Circuit: If the electrical circuit reaches this block, all stacks except one are melted instantly. The Necrons will spawn at the start of the next round suffering minor damage.
Generator Overload: If a Generator Overload hits this block, it is destroyed immediately. The released Necrons spawn instantly but suffer heavy damage and stuned for 1 round.

traits.locale_text:
The coolant is rapidly losing its integrity. At the start of each round, the stack count of this effect decreases by 1. When the last stack is removed, the ice shatters, releasing the imprisoned Necrons at full combat capacity.
Connected Circuit: If the electrical circuit reaches this block, all stacks except one are melted instantly. The Necrons will spawn at the start of the next round suffering minor damage.
Generator Overload: If a Generator Overload hits this block, it is destroyed immediately. The released Necrons spawn instantly but suffer heavy damage and stuned for 1 round.

languages.text: At the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the number of stacks of this effect on the block of ice is reduced by −1. When the last stack is removed, it melts, and Necrons with 90% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} appear in its place. Connected Circuit: if an electrical circuit reaches this block of ice, all stacks except one are removed immediately. The Necrons appear at the start of the next round. They have 70% of their maximum wounds. Generator Overload: if a generator overload hits this block, all stacks are removed, and Necrons appear immediately. They have 50% of their maximum wounds and become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round.

At the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the number of stacks of this effect on the block of ice is reduced by −1. When the last stack is removed, it shatters, and Necrons with 90% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} appear in its place. Connected Circuit: if an electrical circuit reaches this block of ice, all stacks except one are removed immediately. The Necrons appear at the start of the next round. They have 70% of their maximum {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}. Generator Overload: if a generator overload {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} this block, all stacks are removed, and Necrons appear immediately. They have 50% of their maximum wounds and become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round.

languages.text: В начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} число уровней этого эффекта на глыбе льда снижается на 1. Когда снят последний уровень, она исчезает, и на ее месте появляются некроны с 90% от своего {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g}. Замкнутая цепь: если на глыбу льда воздействует электрическая цепь, все заряды, кроме одного, снимаются немедленно. Некроны появляются в начале следующего раунда с 70% от своего максимального здоровья. Перегрузка генератора: если на глыбу льда воздействует перегрузка генератора, все заряды снимаются, и некроны появляются немедленно. Их здоровье составляет 50% от максимального, а также они получают {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушение{/g} на 1 раунд.

languages.text: Au début de chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, le nombre de cumuls de cet effet sur le bloc de glace est réduit de −1. Une fois le dernier cumul supprimé, il fond et des Nécrons disposant de 90 % de leurs {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g} apparaissent à sa place. Circuit connecté : si un circuit électrique atteint ce bloc de glace, tous les cumuls sauf un sont immédiatement supprimés. Les Nécrons apparaissent au début du prochain tour et disposent de 70 % de leurs blessures maximum. Générateur surchargé : si un générateur surchargé touche ce bloc, tous les cumuls sont supprimés et des Nécrons apparaissent immédiatement. Ils disposent de 50 % de leurs blessures maximum et sont {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdis{/g} pendant 1 round.

languages.text: Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} başında buz bloku üzerindeki bu etkinin birikim sayısı 1 azalır. Son birikim de ortadan kalktığında buz bloku erir ve yerine {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanının %90'ına sahip Nekronlar ortaya çıkar. Bağlantılı Devre: Bir elektrik devresi bu buz blokuna ulaşırsa bir tanesi hariç tüm birikimler anında ortadan kalkar. Bir sonraki raundun başında Nekronlar ortaya çıkar. Maksimum sağlık puanının %70'ine sahip olurlar. Jeneratör Fazla Yüklenmesi: Bu bloka bir jeneratör fazla yüklenmesi vurursa tüm birikimler ortadan kalkar ve anında Nekronlar ortaya çıkar. Maksimum sağlık puanının %50'sine sahiptirler ve 1 rauntluğuna {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlerler{/g}.

Maksimum sağlık puanının %50'sine sahiptirler ve 1 rauntluğuna {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlerler{/g}.

languages.text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}开始时，冰块上的此效果层数减少1层。最后一层效果移除后冰块融化，并在其位置出现一名拥有90%{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}的太空死灵。 连接电路：若电路连接到此冰块，则立即移除最后一层外的所有效果层数，拥有70%最大生命值的太空死灵在下一轮开始时出现。 发电机过载：若发电机过载命中此冰块，则立即移除所有层数，太空死灵立刻出现。出现的太空死灵拥有50%的最大生命值，并会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}状态，持续1轮。

Connected Circuit: if an electrical circuit reaches this block of ice, all stacks except one are removed immediately. The Necrons appear at the start of the next round. They have 70% of their maximum wounds. Generator Overload: if a generator overload hits this block, all stacks are removed, and Necrons appear immediately. They have 50% of their maximum wounds and become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round.

languages.text: Al comienzo de cada {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, el número de acumulaciones de este efecto que tiene el bloque de hielo se reducen en 1. Cuando se haya eliminado la última acumulación, el bloque se derrite y aparecen en su lugar Necrones con un 90 % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}. Circuito conectado: si un circuito eléctrico alcanza este bloque de hielo, se eliminan inmediatamente todas las acumulaciones menos una. Al comienzo del próximo asalto aparecerán los Necrones con un 70 % de sus heridas máximas. Sobrecarga de generador: si una sobrecarga de generador alcanza este bloque, se eliminan todas las acumulaciones y aparecen Necrones en el acto con un 50 % de sus heridas máximas y {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdidos{/g} durante 1 asalto.

Sobrecarga de generador: si una sobrecarga de generador alcanza este bloque, se eliminan todas las acumulaciones y aparecen Necrones en el acto con un 50 % de sus heridas máximas y {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdidos{/g} durante 1 asalto.

languages.text: Zu Beginn jeder {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} wird die Zahl der Stapel dieses Effektes, mit dem der Eisblock belegt ist, um −1 reduziert. Wird der letzte Stapel entfernt, schmilzt der Eisblock und an seiner Position erscheinen Necrons mit 90 % ihrer {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g}. Verbundener Schaltkreis: Erreicht ein elektrischer Schaltkreis diesen Eisblock, werden bis auf einen Stapel alle Stapel sofort entfernt. Die Necrons erscheinen zu Beginn der nächsten Runde. Sie haben 70 % ihrer maximalen Wunden. Generatorüberladung: Wenn eine Generatorüberladung diesen Block trifft, werden alle Stapel entfernt und die Necrons erscheinen sofort. Sie haben 50 % ihrer maximalen Wunden und sind 1 Runde lang {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g}.

Sie haben 50 % ihrer maximalen Wunden und sind 1 Runde lang {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g}.

languages.text:
各{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の開始時に、この効果の氷のブロック上のスタック数が-1減る。最後のスタックが消えると、氷は溶け、{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大HP{/g}の90%のネクロがその場所に現れる。
*接続回路*:電気回路が氷のブロックに到達すると、スタックは1つを残して全て消滅する。次のラウンドの開始時にネクロが最大HPの70%で現れる。
*発電機過負荷*:発電機過負荷が氷のブロックに命中すると、スタックは全て消滅し、ネクロが最大HPの50%で即座に現れる。さらに1ラウンドの間、ネクロは{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}スタン{/g}状態になる。
languages.original_text: At the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the number of stacks of this effect on the block of ice is reduced by −1. When the last stack is removed, it melts, and Necrons with 90% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} appear in its place. Connected Circuit: if an electrical circuit reaches this block of ice, all stacks except one are removed immediately. The Necrons appear at the start of the next round. They have 70% of their maximum wounds. Generator Overload: if a generator overload hits this block, all stacks are removed, and Necrons appear immediately. They have 50% of their maximum wounds and become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round.
